children.name: ValidateBuildRequest
children.purpose: Validate the incoming build_request for required fields and business rules
children.behavior: Check action is one of trigger/status/list/cancel; for trigger ensure repo and config present; for status/cancel ensure build_id present; enforce one build per repo+branch constraint for trigger
children.signature: def ValidateBuildRequest(build_request: dict, builds: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read existing builds to check one-build-per-repo+branch constraint

constraints.description: Only one running build per repo+branch allowed

children.name: TriggerBuild
children.purpose: Create a new build record, run compile and test steps, package artifacts, update status
children.behavior: Insert new build record with status 'running', execute compile step, then test step, on success package artifacts and set status 'completed', on failure set status 'failed'
children.signature: def TriggerBuild(validated_request: dict, builds: Database, artifacts: Database) -> dict

acceptance_criteria.description: On success, status updated to 'completed' and artifacts stored

children.name: CheckBuildStatus
children.purpose: Return current status and logs for a given build_id
children.behavior: Look up build record by build_id, return its status and logs
children.signature: def CheckBuildStatus(validated_request: dict, builds: Database) -> dict

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns status and logs for valid build_id

children.name: ListBuildHistory
children.purpose: Return all build records filtered by optional repo/branch/status
children.behavior: Query builds store, apply filters from validated_request (repo, branch, status), return list of matching builds
children.signature: def ListBuildHistory(validated_request: dict, builds: Database) -> list

global_vars.description: Read all build records with optional filters

constraints.description: Filters are optional; empty filters return all builds

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns empty list if no matches

children.name: CancelBuild
children.purpose: Stop a running build and update its status to 'cancelled'
children.behavior: Look up build by build_id, if status is 'running' set status to 'cancelled' and stop execution; if already completed, no-op
children.signature: def CancelBuild(validated_request: dict, builds: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read build record and update status

constraints.description: Only running builds can be cancelled

governance_notes: Each child's global_vars is a subset of parent's global_vars. ValidateBuildRequest, CheckBuildStatus, ListBuildHistory are pure functions (no state mutation). TriggerBuild and CancelBuild are atomic operations that mutate state. All children respect the parent's data store access boundaries.
